home.title: WebCraft — your digital team
home.text1: We create modern responsive websites that work for you. We help startups and private specialists to make a statement online.
home.text2: Our site is a showcase of possibilities: portfolio, news from the web development world, list of services and easy ways to contact us.

about.title: About our team
about.p1: We are a small web studio that helps businesses and individuals get a quality online presence.
about.p2: During our work we have mastered modern technologies: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, React. We are constantly learning and keeping up with trends to offer you the best solutions.
skills: React development (Create React App, Router, hooks)
about.mission_text: To help starting and growing projects get a user-friendly, modern website that will bring clients and build trust in the brand.

items.title: Launched a website for the coffee shop 'Utro'
items.text: Our team completed a project — a responsive landing page with a menu and order form. The client is satisfied with fast loading and modern design.

items.title: Mastered React hooks
items.text: WebCraft developers completed an internal course on hooks: useState, useEffect, useContext. Now the code is cleaner and projects are faster.

items.title: Switching to the new Figma standard
items.text: The studio's designer learned Figma automations and components. Now we are ready to accept layouts in any format.

items.title: Started a web development blog
items.text: We launched a news section where we will share experience, talk about trends and our projects.

services.title: Our Services
services.intro: We offer solutions for creating, improving and maintaining web projects. Each product is developed according to modern standards and your goals.

list.title: Business card site
list.desc: One-page responsive website with information about you or your business. Includes sections: about, services, contacts.

list.title: Landing page
list.desc: A landing page for an ad campaign or product. Thoughtful structure that leads to a target action.

list.title: Improvement & support
list.desc: Bug fixes, adding new blocks, updating content on an existing site.

list.title: Markup from design
list.desc: Turn your Figma layout into clean, cross-browser HTML/CSS code. We'll deliver the finished project in a convenient format.

contacts.title: Contact us
contacts.alert: Thank you, {{name}}! We have received your message.
contacts.error_msg: An error occurred. Please try again later.
